calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Trust Property And Authorize Conveyance
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Schinner for Matthew Lorincz.

Mr. Shinner stated that they had transferred all other properties into the Trust, that this property is not in the corporation, that Mr. Lorincz passed in 2011, that an appraisal was done and that is when they became aware that the property was not in the Trust. The Petition to Confitm Ownership of Trust Property and Authorize Conveyance was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Trust Property And Authorize Conveyance
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
